sections.title: Executive Summary
sections.rendered_content:
NVDA generated $216B in revenue (65.5% YoY) and $120B in net income (64.7% YoY) for 2026-01-25. The period closed with an operating margin of 60.4% and a net margin of 55.6%. Revenue and earnings both expanded at a double-digit pace, consistent with improving operating leverage or favorable demand conditions.

Debt-to-equity of 0.06x and a current ratio of 3.91x indicate a conservatively capitalized balance sheet with room for opportunistic deployment. The quick ratio of 3.24x confirms liquidity depth after excluding inventory from the coverage calculation.

Operating cash flow of $103B (60.3% YoY) converted to $96.7B in free cash flow (58.9% YoY). Capital expenditures totaled $6.04B (2.8% of revenue).

paragraphs.text: NVDA generated $216B in revenue (65.5% YoY) and $120B in net income (64.7% YoY) for 2026-01-25. The period closed with an operating margin of 60.4% and a net margin of 55.6%. Revenue and earnings both expanded at a double-digit pace, consistent with improving operating leverage or favorable demand conditions.

Debt-to-equity of 0.06x and a current ratio of 3.91x indicate a conservatively capitalized balance sheet with room for opportunistic deployment. The quick ratio of 3.24x confirms liquidity depth after excluding inventory from the coverage calculation.
Operating cash flow of $103B (60.3% YoY) converted to $96.7B in free cash flow (58.9% YoY). Capital expenditures totaled $6.04B (2.8% of revenue).

sections.title: Trend Analysis
sections.rendered_content:
free_cash_flow stands at $96.7B (85.7% CAGR). The scale-up across the observed annual periods is pronounced and financially material.

Operating Income stands at $130B (32.4% CAGR). The scale-up across the observed annual periods is pronounced and financially material.

Operating Cash Flow stands at $103B (24.6% CAGR). The scale-up across the observed annual periods is pronounced and financially material.

Net Income stands at $120B (10.1% CAGR). The multi-year progression is steady enough to suggest an improving operating profile.

sections.title: Risk Factors
sections.rendered_content:
The following governed risk signals are active in the locked annual basis and should frame interpretation of the current results.

Current-period completeness gap: Current period is missing Marketable Securities while prior exists.

sections.title: Analyst Notes
sections.rendered_content:
Gross margin of 71.1% reflects significant value capture, consistent with asset-light or IP-intensive business models.

ROE of 101.5% is well above the 15% institutional threshold, suggesting strong capital allocation.

Revenue surged 65.5% year over year, indicating a step-change in demand or market expansion.

Analysis is anchored to the locked annual period ending 2026-01-25, with prior-period comparisons drawn from 2025-01-26. Metrics without required inputs remain intentionally unfilled rather than estimated.
